glosses.ja: 捕まえる; 捕獲する

sentences.target: Tu peux capturer l'écran, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø kap.ty.ʁe le.kʁɑ̃, sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux capturer l'écran, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø kap.ty.ʁe le.kʁɑ̃, sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you capture the screen, please.
translations.es: Por favor, haz una captura de pantalla.
translations.pt: Por favor, faz uma captura de tela.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, ta et skjermbilde.
translations.ro: Te rog, fă o captură de ecran.
translations.ja: スクリーンショットをお願いします。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject personal pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Present indicative (2sg) of the modal auxiliary 'pouvoir'; selects the infinitive 'capturer' to express ability.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal 'peux'; denotes the action to perform.
Common noun 'écran' with elided definite article 'le' as clitic 'l''; direct object of 'capturer'.
Subordinating conjunction 'si' elided before vowel-initial 'il'; initiates the polite formula 's'il te plaît' ('if it pleases you').
2nd-person singular clitic pronoun (indirect/dative object) within the expression 'te plaît'.
3rd-person singular present of 'plaire'; predicate in the fixed polite expression; implicit subject is 'il'.

sentences.target: Je capture ce moment à contre-jour.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kap.ty.ʁ sə mɔ.mɑ̃ a kɔ̃tʁə ʒuʁ/

translations.fr: Je capture ce moment à contre-jour.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kap.ty.ʁ sə mɔ.mɑ̃ a kɔ̃tʁə ʒuʁ/
translations.en: I'm capturing this moment against the light.
translations.es: Estoy capturando este momento a contraluz.
translations.de: Ich fotografiere diesen Moment im Gegenlicht.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在逆光下捕捉这一刻。
translations.yue: 我喺逆光下捕捉呢一刻。
translations.ru: Я снимаю этот момент в контровом свете.
translations.pt: Estou capturando este momento a contraluz.
translations.he: אני מצלם את הרגע הזה נגד האור.
translations.vi: Tôi đang ghi lại khoảnh khắc này ngược sáng.
translations.nl: Ik leg dit moment vast tegen het licht.
translations.uk: Я знімаю цей момент проти світла.
translations.hi: मैं इस पल को उल्टी रोशनी में कैद कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Αποτυπώνω αυτή τη στιγμή κόντρα στο φως.
translations.nb: Jeg fanger dette øyeblikket i motlys.
translations.id: Saya memotret momen ini dalam cahaya belakang.
translations.sv: Jag fångar detta ögonblick i motljus.
translations.da: Jeg fanger dette øjeblik i modlys.
translations.ja: 逆光でこの瞬間を撮っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject personal pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Present indicative (1sg) of 'capturer'; transitive main verb.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'moment'.
Common noun; direct object of 'capture'.
Preposition; introduces the prepositional phrase indicating manner.
Hyphenated compound noun; object of 'à'; the PP 'à contre-jour' functions adverbially (manner: backlit).

sentences.target: On capture trois monstres dans le jeu.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ kap.ty.ʁ twa mɔ̃stʁ dɑ̃ lə ʒø/

translations.fr: On capture trois monstres dans le jeu.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ kap.ty.ʁ twa mɔ̃stʁ dɑ̃ lə ʒø/
translations.en: We're capturing three monsters in the game.
translations.es: Estamos capturando tres monstruos en el juego.
translations.de: Wir fangen drei Monster im Spiel.
translations.it: Stiamo catturando tre mostri nel gioco.
translations.ko: 게임에서 몬스터 세 마리를 잡고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在游戏里抓三只怪物。
translations.yue: 我哋喺遊戲入面捉三隻怪物。
translations.ru: Мы ловим в игре трёх монстров.
translations.pt: Estamos capturando três monstros no jogo.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang bắt ba con quái vật trong trò chơi.
translations.ar: نحن نمسك بثلاثة وحوش في اللعبة.
translations.nl: We vangen drie monsters in het spel.
translations.uk: Ми ловимо в грі трьох монстрів.
translations.hu: A játékban három szörnyet fogunk el.
translations.hi: हम खेल में तीन राक्षस पकड़ रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi fanger tre monstre i spillet.
translations.id: Kami menangkap tiga monster di dalam permainan.
translations.sv: Vi fångar tre monster i spelet.
translations.da: Vi fanger tre monstre i spillet.
translations.ja: ゲームでモンスターを三体捕まえています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; here used as 'we'; grammatical subject.
Present indicative (3sg) of 'capturer'; transitive main verb (agreement with 'on').
Cardinal numeral; quantifies 'monstres'.
Common noun in plural; direct object of 'capture'.
Preposition; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article; determiner of 'jeu'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans' (location).

sentences.target: Tu captures bien les émotions ici.

translations.fr: Tu captures bien les émotions ici.
translations.de: Hier fängst du die Emotionen gut ein.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在这里把情绪捕捉得很好。
translations.yue: 你喺呢度好好咁捕捉到情緒。
translations.pt: Aqui você capta bem as emoções.
translations.he: כאן אתה לוכד היטב את הרגשות.
translations.vi: Ở đây bạn nắm bắt cảm xúc rất tốt.
translations.nl: Hier leg je de emoties goed vast.
translations.hi: यहाँ तुम भावनाओं को अच्छी तरह पकड़ते हो.
translations.id: Di sini kamu menangkap emosi dengan baik.
translations.ja: ここでは感情をうまく捉えているね。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject personal pronoun; grammatical subject.
Present indicative (2sg) of 'capturer'; transitive main verb.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb to indicate quality of the action.
Definite plural article; determiner of 'émotions'.
Common noun in plural; direct object of 'captures'.
Locative adverb; specifies place/deictic context for the action.
